en: Spray application of coatings exceeding 2% lead by mass must not occur.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 125(1)
Work involving lead dust must be carried out in a manner that minimizes dust generation.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 125(1)
Respiratory protection for workers must be provided where lead dust exposure occurs.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 125(2)
Warm running water and skin care products must be provided for workers performing lead-dust work.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 125(3)

The relevant labor inspectorate must be notified if construction work that involves lead dust release is carried out and is expected to last longer than five working days.\nConstruction Workers Protection Ordinance, Section 3(5)(3)
Notification to Labor Inspectorate (If Work Expected to Last Longer Than 5 Days)
